rules: countries with multiple capital ambiguity excluded

sources.base: Existing GeoRank v0.1 country file derived from countryinfo/manual seed values
sources.coastline: LSYS/country-coastline-distance coastlines.csv, coastline_wf from CIA World Factbook
sources.highestPoint: Flagpedia highest-point list cross-checked conceptually against Wikipedia elevation-extremes table

notes: Coastline values vary by source; GeoRank freezes coastline_wf for consistency.
Highest-point values are game-source values; some disputed countries/high points use the frozen source ranking.
